title: draba nivalis var. genuina
intro: Draba nivalis var. genuina, also known as Arctic Whitlowgrass, is a small, annual flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Draba nivalis var. genuina include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as possibly providing antioxidant and anticancer properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for herbal preparations.
